block_01: These patterns are the reason for mistakes
block_02: Psychological patterns are a huge part of trading. They contribute to the trading style you exercise and influence your decision-making.
block_03: Some patterns, for instance, the accessibility bias, can be harmful for traders as they inevitably lead to increased losses. Read the full article to discover more spooky psychological patterns and understand why traders lose their money.
